_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify and prioritize critical business functions in collaboration with organizational stakeholders.
reference_document_element_description: Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, methodology alignment, and stakeholder communication across business units.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.494), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.493).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.584). Shared vocabulary: [business]. DCWF-only terms [collaboration, critical, functions, identify, organizational, prioritize] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, across, alignment, analytical, communication, complex] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.893, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Identify and prioritize critical business functions in collaboration with organi" and "Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, met" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.542 ≈ STS 0.584 (gap 0.042). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [business] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [business]. DCWF-only: [collaboration, critical, functions, identify, organizational, prioritize]. WIDAI-only: [access, across, alignment, analytical, communication, complex].
